CustomField.formula:
IF( AND( OR(TEXT(Sell__c) = "BTC", TEXT(Sell__c) = "ETH", TEXT(Sell__c) = "USDT"), OR(TEXT(Buy__c) = "EUR", TEXT(Buy__c) = "USD", TEXT(Buy__c) = "GBP", TEXT(Buy__c) = "AED") ), "Crypto Off-ramp", /* Selling crypto to buy fiat */
IF( AND( OR(TEXT(Sell__c) = "EUR", TEXT(Sell__c) = "USD", TEXT(Sell__c) = "GBP", TEXT(Sell__c) = "AED"), OR(TEXT(Buy__c) = "BTC", TEXT(Buy__c) = "ETH", TEXT(Buy__c) = "USDT") ), "Crypto On-ramp", /* Selling fiat to buy crypto */
IF( AND( OR(TEXT(Sell__c) = "BTC", TEXT(Sell__c) = "ETH", TEXT(Sell__c) = "USDT"), OR(TEXT(Buy__c) = "BTC", TEXT(Buy__c) = "ETH", TEXT(Buy__c) = "USDT") ), "Crypto-to-Crypto", /* Crypto swap */ "FX" /* All other cases: fiat-to-fiat */ ) ) )
CustomField.label: Trade Type
